title: Fiery Gooey Mexican Natto Fajitas
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly, peppery, and gooey Mexican dish featuring natto, served in a fajita style, perfect for a brunch mood. This norteño inspired recipe combines the creaminess of cheese with the spiciness of peppers.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the sliced onions and bell peppers.
Cook the vegetables for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the natto and cook for 2 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until it is melted and gooey.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by spooning the natto and vegetable mixture onto a tortilla and topping with salsa and cilantro.
Garnish with additional cilantro and salsa if desired.
